variants.title: Filtrec AS1196 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT609
variants.option1Value: Filtrec AS1196 Spin-On Filter | Replaces the Filtrec WT609
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec AS1196. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the AS1196 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
